apps.name: Hello (wasi:http)
apps.description: Minimal wasi:http component that returns a greeting. Smoke-test app.

apps.name: NN Demo (wasi-nn)
apps.description: wasi-nn smoke test: runs a tiny baked-in ONNX graph through the host's ONNX Runtime. GET / tries the GPU (CUDA) and reports a CPU fallback; ?target=gpu|cpu pins the execution target.
